subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou hearest my cry and lamentation in this most remote prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی تسمع ضجیجی و صریخی فی هذا السجن الذی کان فی اقصی
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
